name: Salsa Cruda (Fresh Salsa)
recipeIngredient: 2 Fresh Anaheim chiles, seeded and chopped.
2 Fresh jalapeno pepper, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Make sure all ingredients are at room temperature before combining.
2. In a lidded jar, combine the chopped tomatoes, tomatillos, Anaheim chiles, green onions, jalapeno peppers, cumin, lime juice, sugar, cilantro, and black pepper with salt.
3. Stir until well mixed.
4. Allow the mixture to marinate at room temperature for at least one hour before serving.
5. The salsa can be stored in an airtight container in the refrigerator for about 2-3 weeks.
